positive: Stylized vintage celestial forest scene, featuring a central grove of bioluminescent mushrooms and ancient, gnarled trees. The composition should be highly symmetrical and symmetrical, with deep indigo and emerald green dominating the color palette, accented by warm gold and soft peach glowing elements. Silhouettes of stylized constellations and faint cosmic dust drift through the canopy. The art style should evoke stained glass mixed with intricate etching and delicate linework, achieving high contrast and a distinct, clean graphic quality suitable for screen printing on apparel. The lighting should be ethereal and dramatic, originating from the glowing flora and celestial bodies, casting defined, stylized shadows. Full view, clean edges, high detail, centered design.
